StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(mi.info) AS budget, MIN(t.title) AS unsuccsessful_movie FROM job.company_name AS cn, job.company_type AS ct, job.info_type AS it1, job.info_type AS it2, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.movie_info AS mi, job.movie_info_idx AS mi_idx, job.title AS t WHERE cn.country_code ='[us]' AND ct.kind IS NOT NULL AND (ct.kind ='production companies' OR ct.kind = 'distributors') AND it1.info ='budget' AND it2.info ='bottom 10 rank' AND t.production_year >2000 AND (t.title LIKE 'Birdemic%' OR t.title LIKE '%Movie%') AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mi_idx.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = it1.id AND mi_idx.info_type_id = it2.id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND ct.id = mc.company_type_id AND cn.id = mc.company_id AND mc.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND mc.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND mi.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id
